name: Face As Family Currency
description: Family respect is partly organized around face, comparison, and visible achievement.
life_effect: Choices become harder when they cannot be explained as respectable.

name: Parent Path Shadow
description: The user is not only choosing a future, but also trying not to repeat a parental life path.
life_effect: Avoidance of inherited scripts can become as powerful as desire for a new path.

name: Emotional Debt Family
description: Care and guilt are tangled, making independence feel morally expensive.
life_effect: The person may delay autonomy until it can be justified as not betraying the family.

name: Unstable Parental Attachment
description: Family attachment is unstable enough that safety and closeness are not naturally linked.
life_effect: Relationship safety may stay low even when practical support exists.

name: Control Disguised As Care
description: Care appears together with control, so support may also feel invasive.
life_effect: The person may reject help because help has historically carried control.
